comments: TV sets a competition for winners to win tickets to see an exclusive Bon Jovi gig in the UK on 5th November.
TV reads out the winners who will see Metallica in concert.
TV mentions that he'll be on Raw Power on ITV at 2am, where the camera crew look into how the Friday Rock Show is prepared.

Keep The Faith (album - Keep The Faith) Mercury
Gus O'Ria
Color Me Blind (album - III Sides To Every Story) A&M
Wherever I May Roam (single) Vertigo
TV counts down the top 30 rock album charts

Don't Get Away This Time
Rock War (File a ends and File b begins at few seconds into Slidedog's track)
Die With Your Boots On (album - Piece Of Mind) EMI
Fight
Brand New America (single) Hollywood
Never Turn Our Back On The Blues (album - Never Turn Our Back On The Blues) Castle Communications
Mouth For War (single) ATCO
